title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Bastion enables financial institutions to issue regulated stablecoins and optimize reserves. The company seeks backend-focused senior engineers for its engineering team.

30-Day Expectations

Candidates should ramp on service layout, CI/CD, observability and deliver a small feature. Outcomes include multiple production deployments and improved onboarding documentation.

90-Day Expectations

Engineers take ownership of a service or capability across our product and lead medium-scope projects like API updates or partner integrations, becoming the go-to expert for their domain.

180-Day Expectations

Lead cross-service initiatives such as API versioning or data migrations, providing technical direction through design documentation and mentoring.

Technical Stack

- Languages: Go, TypeScript/Node.js, Rust
- Patterns: gRPC, REST, GraphQL/tRPC
- Data: Postgres, Redis, Kafka, Temporal
- Infrastructure: AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Nitro Enclaves
- Observability: Datadog, Grafana, Sentry, Incident.io

Key Problem Areas

Design stable APIs for custody and transfers; build idempotent job flows with audit trails; harden key operations; improve latency through optimization.

requirements.description: Proficiency in Go as primary backend language
API design experience with gRPC, REST, and GraphQL patterns
Data layer experience with Postgres, Redis, and Kafka
Infrastructure experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform
CI/CD and observability experience (Datadog, Grafana, Sentry)
Ability to take ownership of a service or capability and become domain expert
Lead cross-service initiatives such as API versioning or data migrations with design documentation
Design stable APIs for custody and transfers with idempotent job flows and audit trails
Mentoring junior engineers and providing technical direction
